emails.subject: FW: Montana Megawatts I, LLC

emails.subject: RE: Montana Megawatts I, LLC
emails.body: RE: Montana Megawatts I, LLC yep. I asked Jeff Darst to sign and fax back to us. To: Carnahan, Kathleen

emails.subject: RE: Montana Megawatts I, LLC
emails.body: I'm talking about the member interest power in particular. We don't have to have to send them the Darst stuff today. I have another piece of paper that Dave needs to sign as well. To: Mann, Kay
